cedict_en: to feign/to pretend to be/to pass oneself off as
at one's wit's end/unable to find a way out

surname Mei | classifier for small objects: coins, badges, rings, carved seals, chess pieces, eggs, fingerprints etc (more formal than 個|个[ge4])/classifier for bombs, missiles, satellites etc/(on product packaging) classifier for flat items (from Japanese 枚 "mai")/(old) stick used as a gag to prevent soldiers from talking while sneaking up on the enemy
(of a seed) to germinate/(of a plant) to sprout; to bud/sprout; bud/(also used figuratively)

(literary) sincere; honest; genuine | drizzle/mist | to deceive/to cheat/to hoodwink/to make a wild guess | blind/dim-sighted | surname Meng | Mongol ethnic group/abbr. for Mongolia 蒙古國|蒙古国[Meng3 gu3 guo2]/Taiwan pr. [Meng2] | (knocked) unconscious/dazed/stunned | to cover/ignorant/to suffer (misfortune)/to receive (a favor)/to cheat
to blind (as with dust)/Taiwan pr. [mi3] | to narrow one's eyes/to squint/(dialect) to take a nap
to complement/to make up for a deficiency
